summary: Re-verified /api/ai/correlate performance fix. EXCELLENT RESULTS: Correlation endpoint now serves cached results in 0.12-0.14s (well under 2s target), background auto-correlation keeps cache warm. All frontend features working perfectly. One issue: /api/ai/chat times out at >40s (exceeds 30s target).

performance_issues.issue: Claude chat response takes >40 seconds, exceeding 30s target
performance_issues.impact: Chat widget will timeout when sending messages to Claude
performance_issues.root_cause: Claude API call is synchronous and takes too long. May need to implement streaming response or async job queue
performance_issues.workaround: None - chat feature will be slow for users

graceful_degradation.status: 2/8 adapters showing error/stale status due to GDELT/CoinGecko public API rate limits
graceful_degradation.impact: Expected and acceptable - system continues to function with 6/8 healthy sources
graceful_degradation.note: This is graceful degradation as mentioned in agent_to_agent_context_note

✅ BACKEND: POST /api/ai/correlate subsequent call returns in 0.14s with cached=true (well under 2s target)
✅ BACKEND: GET /api/ai/correlate/latest returns in 0.23s with 6 signals and 5 leverageable_ideas (exceeds ≥3 requirement)
✅ BACKEND: GET /api/meta returns in 0.13s without timeout
✅ BACKEND: GET /api/ returns name+status

✅ BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
✅ BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns operator info

✅ FRONTEND: Left sidebar Sensor Grid shows all 8+ sensors with live counts (Air Activity: 396, Thermal Spikes: 500, SDR Coverage: 892, Maritime Watch: 600, Nuclear Sites: 6, Conflict Events: 0, Health Watch: 0, World News: 40, OSINT Feed: 31, Space Activity: 7)

success_percentage.backend_ai_correlation: 100% (3/3 correlation endpoints working perfectly - MAJOR FIX VERIFIED)
success_percentage.backend_ai_chat: 0% (1/1 chat endpoint times out at >40s, exceeds 30s target)
success_percentage.frontend_interactions: 100% (login, map toggle, region tabs, chat widget open/close, logout all work)
success_percentage.overall: 93% (14/15 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed)

action_item_for_main_agent: 🎉 MAJOR SUCCESS: /api/ai/correlate performance fix VERIFIED and working excellently! Correlation now returns in <1s with cached results, background auto-correlation keeps cache warm. ❌ ONE REMAINING ISSUE: POST /api/ai/chat takes >40s (exceeds 30s target). This needs optimization - consider: (1) implementing streaming response for chat, (2) reducing snapshot context size in chat prompt, (3) using async job queue, or (4) increasing timeout to 60s if 40s is acceptable. NOTE: 2/8 adapters (news, crypto) show error/stale status due to public API rate limits - this is expected graceful degradation and acceptable per requirements.
